sizing_rule.note: Reinvestment-based position sizing: reduce contract size after each losing trade during drawdown periods. Exact scale-down multiplier and drawdown threshold not specified in excerpt. Author advocates reinvestment methodology over fixed contracts to buffer equity decline.

source_rule_text: Trade on a reinvestment basis rather than nonreinvestment basis to buffer drawdowns, as each losing trade is followed by subsequent trades with fewer contracts during drawdown periods.
